# User Microservice (user-ms)

> Cloud-native Spring Boot microservice for user account management with JWT authentication.

## Tech Stack

- Java 25, Spring Boot 3.5.x, Gradle 9.1.x
- MariaDB 11.8.x (production), H2 (development)
- Spring Security, Spring Data JPA, JWT

## Package Structure

- controller/ - REST API endpoints
- service/ - Business logic
- repository/ - Data access (Spring Data JPA)
- model/ - JPA entities
- dto/ - Request/response objects
- security/ - JWT and security config

## API Endpoints

- POST /api/user/register - User registration
- GET /api/user/confirm - Email confirmation
- POST /api/auth/login - Authentication (returns JWT)
- POST /api/auth/forgot-password - Password reset request
- POST /api/auth/reset-password - Password reset
- PUT /api/user/change-password - Change password (authenticated)
- GET /api/user/profile - User profile (authenticated)

## Key Files

- app/src/main/java/com/rubensgomes/userms/UserMsApplication.java - Main application
- app/src/main/java/com/rubensgomes/userms/controller/UserController.java - User endpoints
- app/src/main/java/com/rubensgomes/userms/controller/AuthController.java - Auth endpoints
- app/src/main/java/com/rubensgomes/userms/model/User.java - User entity
- app/src/main/java/com/rubensgomes/userms/security/JwtTokenProvider.java - JWT handling
- app/build.gradle.kts - Build configuration

## Documentation

- API.md - Full API specification
- CLAUDE.md - Development guidelines
- README.md - Project overview
